name: hmu-atl-videos
description: HMU ATL feature documentation videos built with Remotion

scripts.render:driver-onboarding: npx remotion render src/index.ts DriverOnboarding out/driver-onboarding.mp4
scripts.render:passenger-booking: npx remotion render src/index.ts PassengerBooking out/passenger-booking.mp4
scripts.render:ride-experience: npx remotion render src/index.ts RideExperience out/ride-experience.mp4
scripts.render:add-ons: npx remotion render src/index.ts InRideAddOns out/in-ride-add-ons.mp4
scripts.render:chat-booking: npx remotion render src/index.ts ChatBooking out/chat-booking.mp4
scripts.render:driver-earnings: npx remotion render src/index.ts DriverEarnings out/driver-earnings.mp4
scripts.render:ride-flow: npx remotion render src/index.ts RideFlow out/ride-flow.mp4
